meta.title: Set up Axum application foundation with core infrastructure

subtask.role: You are a Rust Engineer specializing in high-performance systems. Implement subtask 2.1.

context.overview: Establish the basic Axum web server structure, database connections, and core middleware components needed for the notification routing service.

requirements.description: Create new Rust project with Axum framework, set up PostgreSQL connection pool using sqlx, implement basic middleware stack (logging, CORS, error handling), create notification data models and database schema migrations, establish project structure with proper module organization for handlers, models, and services.
